title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - Yes
scenario: Reset Device restores all device settings to default values after confirmation in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the app via the Home screen.
3. Change all device settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) to non-default values.
4. Navigate to Device Settings: Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
5. Tap "Reset Device" in the Device Settings screen.
7. On the confirmation popup, tap "Yes" to confirm the reset.
8. Observe the success message displayed on screen.
9. Tap "OK" on the success message popup.

10. Navigate through all device settings (Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, etc.) and verify each setting has been restored to its default value as per UI specifications.
expected: A success message "Settings Restored! Remember to unplug and power off/on your headset" appears. After tapping "OK", all device settings (ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, etc.) are restored to their default values as per UI specifications.
